title: Enel Turns the Sky Into a Death Sentence
main_description: Enel sets the Ark Maxim and his storm clouds against Skypiea while Luffy, Nami, and the others realize the island itself is in danger.
key_events: Enel Turns the Sky Into a Death Sentence
Enel sets the Ark Maxim and his storm clouds against Skypiea while Luffy, Nami, and the others realize the island itself is in danger.
